scripts.setup:site: mkdir -p site/public && test -L site/images || ln -s ../src/images site/images
scripts.generate: npm run setup:site && python3 bin/build-index.py && python3 bin/build-tasting-notes.py && python3 bin/build-rating-sheet.py
scripts.pdf: npm run pdf:notes && npm run pdf:rating
scripts.all: npm run generate && npm run pdf && npm run build
